fd_explain: A Fixed Deposit (FD) is a safe investment where you keep money for a fixed time and earn interest.
ask_amount: Please tell amount, rate and time (example: ₹50000 for 2 years at 7%)
fd_start_flow: To start an FD, please visit our nearest branch or use the 'Book FD' option in our mobile app. You can also start manually by providing your details here.
fd_rate_info: Our current FD interest rates are up to 7.5% per annum for general citizens and 8.0% for senior citizens.
